title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: dpdk bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for dpdk is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The dpdk packages provide the Data Plane Development Kit, which is a set of libraries and drivers for fast packet processing in the user space.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): DPDK application for MLX require NET_ADMIN [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101602)  Enable DPDK mlx5 poll mode driver on ARM [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109899)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server - AUS
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Update Services for SAP Solutions 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - 4 years of updates
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Extended Update Support 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server for Power LE - Update Services for SAP Solutions
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian - Extended Update Support
full_text:
An update for dpdk is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The dpdk packages provide the Data Plane Development Kit, which is a set of libraries and drivers for fast packet processing in the user space.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): DPDK application for MLX require NET_ADMIN [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101602)  Enable DPDK mlx5 poll mode driver on ARM [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109899)
